description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, futuristic design with a predominantly metallic purple body accented by teal and black components. The main body is streamlined, with smooth, contoured surfaces and integrated mechanical details, suggesting advanced technology. The stock is compact and angular, with a teal grip and buttplate, while the barrel is enclosed within the body, giving the weapon a solid, monolithic appearance. The trigger area is protected by a robust, rounded guard, and the underside features a visible grip and mechanical elements. The top of the shotgun is smooth, with a slight ridge running along its length, and the muzzle area is reinforced with teal structural elements. Overall, the shotgun appears to be constructed from advanced metal alloys and polymers, designed for both durability and ergonomic handling.
description: A sleek, metallic purple shotgun with teal and black accents, featuring a compact, futuristic design and integrated mechanical details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the contoured body, teal grip, and integrated mechanical details.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the smooth, streamlined upper surface and the compact width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, but with subtle differences in the mechanical detailing and grip structure.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the grip, trigger guard, and the reinforced teal buttplate, emphasizing the shotgun's ergonomic design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, fully enclosed within the body, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_stock_type: full stock with angular, compact design
attribute_action_mechanism: semi-automatic (based on lack of visible pump or break-action mechanism)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, robust trigger guard with a smooth, continuous contour and no visible finger grooves
